title: Notion Habit Tracker — Build Habits That Actually Stick
description:
Stop abandoning your habits after two weeks. This all-in-one Notion Habit Tracker gives you a beautifully structured system to define, log, analyze, and celebrate your daily habits — all in one place you already own.

Built for everyone from beginners to power users, this template includes four interconnected databases: a Habit Library to define your habits with categories, cues, and difficulty ratings; a Daily Log to check off habits and capture mood and quality data; a Weekly Review system to reflect and course-correct; and a Goals & Milestones tracker to keep you motivated with long-term targets.

The visual dashboard shows you today's habits, streak leaders, this week at a glance, and your latest weekly review — the moment you open Notion. No more wondering how you're doing. No more lost streaks you didn't know you were building.

Whether you want to build a morning routine, exercise consistently, or finally track the habits that matter across health, work, mindset, and relationships — this template gives you the clarity, structure, and insight to make it happen.
